revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wiktionary pipe/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|wtp}} Makes a box to link to [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] just like {{tl|Wiktionary}}, but this template works just like [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped linking]]: ===Usage=== {{Wiktionary pipe|''actual link''|''displayed term''}} ====Examples==== {{Wiktionary pipe|tree#English|tree}} {{Wiktionary pipe|tree#English|tree}} {{Wiktionary pipe|πᾶν|πᾶν (pan)|πᾶς|πᾶς (pas)}} {{Wiktionary pipe|πᾶν|πᾶν (pan)|πᾶς|πᾶς (pas)}} {{Wiktionary pipe|鹿威し|shishiodoshi}} {{Wiktionary pipe|鹿威し|shishiodoshi}} Leave out the "displayed term" to use the "actual link" in its place: {{Wiktionary pipe|square bracket||Unsupported titles/Square brackets|[ ]}} {{Wiktionary pipe|square bracket||Unsupported titles/Square brackets|<nowiki>[ ]</nowiki>}} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{-}} '''If placing this template in a section all by itself, put on a line all by itself, without indentation or bullets, like so:''' *{{Wiktionary pipe|five|two and two}} → {{Wiktionary pipe|five|two and two}} {{-}} {{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects#Where to place links]] for more information and alternatives. ===See also=== {{Wiktionary templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wiktionary link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
